issue_description: Terminated employee still has an active Active Directory account.
risk_statement: Unauthorized access may occur if terminated accounts remain active.
recommendation: Disable the account immediately and review offboarding procedures.

issue_description: Active Directory account exists without a matching HR employee record.
risk_statement: Unowned or unmanaged accounts may be used for unauthorized access and may bypass standard joiner/mover/leaver controls.
recommendation: Investigate account ownership, disable if not required, and reconcile identity records with HR.

issue_description: Active account has not logged in for 163 days.
risk_statement: Dormant accounts may be exploited by unauthorized users, especially where access is privileged or no longer required.
recommendation: Review business need for the account and disable or remove access where no longer required.

issue_description: Active account does not have multi-factor authentication enabled.
risk_statement: Accounts without MFA are more vulnerable to credential theft, phishing, and unauthorized access.
recommendation: Enable MFA for the account and enforce MFA through identity provider policy.

issue_description: User has conflicting roles: AP_CREATOR and AP_APPROVER.
risk_statement: User can both create and approve supplier payments
recommendation: Review role assignments and remove conflicting access where inappropriate.

issue_description: User has conflicting roles: IAM_ADMIN and BILLING_ADMIN.
risk_statement: User can administer cloud identities and manage billing
recommendation: Review role assignments and remove conflicting access where inappropriate.

issue_description: User has conflicting roles: CHANGE_REQUESTER and CHANGE_APPROVER.
risk_statement: User can request and approve own changes

issue_description: User has conflicting roles: GL_POSTER and GL_REVIEWER.
risk_statement: User can post and review general ledger entries
recommendation: Review role assignments and remove conflicting access where inappropriate.

issue_description: User has conflicting roles: HR_ADMIN and PAYROLL_VIEWER.
risk_statement: User can administer HR records and view payroll
recommendation: Review role assignments and remove conflicting access where inappropriate.
